title: Thayeria nectarifera
taxonomy: Thayeria nectarifera is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Thayeria and is native to Central and South America. This epiphytic orchid is characterized by its bright and showy flowers, which are typically yellow in color. Thayeria nectarifera is often found growing on trees in tropical forests, where it can thrive in a humid environment. As a member of the Orchidaceae family, Thayeria nectarifera is closely related to other orchids, such as Phalaenopsis and Dendrobium.
